title: Looking for Teacher at IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions:
IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions!
